title: Manage imported data
excerpt: Search for and manage existing imported data. After you import data, you can manage it through the [Dashboard](https://dashboard.stripe.com/revenue-recognition/data-import). After you upload a CSV, you can refresh the page to see the status of the import in the **Imported files** preview on the top right. ![Data import landing page](https://b.stripecdn.com/docs-statics-srv/assets/data-import-landing-page.8b30b5093e9353bc36730662b1958102.png) Click **View all** to see a list of all imported files. ![Data import imported files csv list](https://b.stripecdn.com/docs-statics-srv/assets/data-import-imported-files-csv-list.c6d02c2774ef8aaf9c6a775a6ccad023.png)
